brief_justification: Arrives at exactly (B) with valid mechanism (quality dilution + attention splitting) linking back to the failed intervention; goes one level beyond surface by explaining finite quality and audience attention constraints but does not trace second/third-order effects; explicitly names 'suppressing linear one-way thinking' showing process awareness; uses the intervention failure as a sanity check confirming the model; presents conclusions assertively without stating confidence levels or identifying what evidence would overturn (B); does not evaluate alternatives (A)(C)(D) explicitly, only implicitly dismisses positive direction; reasoning chain is traceable step-by-step but some intermediate derivations (e.g., why finite attention implies negative slope specifically) are assumed; explicitly avoids one-way causal treatment and identifies both aggregate vs. per-unit feedback dynamics; shows zero evidence of linear_causation or feedback_loop_blindness and explicitly calls out suppression in preamble; follows the loop-identification and classification steps of the topology but does not trace the gate/branch structure explicitly
